intro.slide0Body: Pick who is playing, then complete tasks on the Home tab to earn stars. Each child has their own progress.
intro.slide1Body: When a task is done, stars are added automatically. Spend them in the Rewards tab on fun treats parents have set up.
intro.slide2Body: Open the Parents tab to add tasks and rewards, manage profiles, and keep everything protected with a PIN.

onboarding.kidsSub: Add each child who will earn stars. You can add more later in the parent settings.
onboarding.nameRequired: Please enter a name for every child.
onboarding.emailSub: If you want email updates, enter your address and choose what to be notified about. You can change this anytime in parent settings.
onboarding.notifyTaskSub: Email when a child finishes a task
onboarding.notifyRewardSub: Email when a child spends stars on a reward
onboarding.emailHint: Emails are sent only if you add a valid email, turn on a switch, and configure a notify URL in the app (see app settings / developer docs).
onboarding.languageSub: Tasks and rewards will start in this language. You can change it anytime in parent settings.

home.tapToChangeProfile: Tap to choose who is playing

profiles.tapToSwitch: Tap to play as this person
profiles.chooseAvatarSub: Pick a sticker, take a new photo, or choose one from your library for {{name}}.
profiles.permissionPhotos: We need access to your photos so you can pick a profile picture.
profiles.permissionCamera: We need access to the camera so you can take a profile picture.
profiles.photoSaveError: Could not save that photo. Try another one.

reward.pickBelow: You can spend stars in the reward shop!

tasks.activeSub: Tap a task when you’re done to earn stars. Finished tasks appear below.
tasks.emptyNoTasks: No tasks yet — a parent can add some.
tasks.emptyAllDone: All done for today! Great job.
tasks.completedSub: Tasks you finished today and the stars you got for each one.
tasks.emptyCompleted: Nothing completed yet — finish a task above first.
tasks.completedLimited: Showing the 3 most recent. {{total}} completed today.

shop.title: Reward shop
shop.entrySub: Spend your stars on fun rewards.
shop.sub: Parents add rewards here. Spend your stars when you have enough.
shop.empty: No rewards yet — ask a parent to add one.
shop.celebrationShowParent: Show this to a grown-up so they know what you chose!

lock.subCreate: Choose a number PIN (at least {{min}} digits). Only parents should know it.
lock.subEnter: Enter your PIN to open the parent area.
lock.errorMismatch: Those do not match. Try again.
lock.errorWrongPassword: That doesn't match the PIN you chose. Please try again.

parent.darkModeSub: Use dark colors across the app.
parent.showIntroSub: Show the intro slides again—for example when someone new uses the app.
parent.reusableDuplicate: This task is already saved as reusable (same name and stars).
parent.activeTaskDuplicate: You already have a task with this name and star reward.
parent.reusableSub: Templates you can add to the list again anytime. Saving does not remove tasks from today’s list.
parent.emptyReusable: No reusable tasks yet — save one from the form or from an existing task.
parent.pinTooShort: New PIN needs at least {{min}} digits.
parent.currentWrong: That doesn't match your current PIN. Please try again.
parent.resetStarProgressSub: Sets this child’s stars to zero and moves today’s completed tasks back to To do so they can earn stars again.
parent.childrenSectionSub: Each child has their own stars, tasks, templates, and rewards.
parent.emailNotificationsSub: Optional updates when children complete tasks or pick rewards. Requires a server URL in app config (never put email API secrets in the app).
parent.emailNotifyTaskSub: Send an email when a child finishes a task
parent.emailNotifyRewardSub: Send an email when a child spends stars on a reward
parent.removeChildConfirmMessage: This child’s stars, tasks, templates, and rewards will be deleted.
parent.cannotRemoveLastChild: You need at least one child profile.
parent.resetStarsAlertMessage: Stars will go to zero and today’s completed tasks will reappear in To do.
